title: Chaudhary Charan Singh University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Chaudhary Charan Singh University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Chaudhary Charan Singh University Result 2026 out for MBA 2nd Semester on the official website - ccsuniversity.ac.in on 15-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the CCSU MBA result.

content.text: Chaudhary Charan Singh Universit, Meerut has released CCSU Result 2026 for MBA 2nd Semester examinations conducted for the 2025-26 academic session. The university has updated its online result portal and release notes page with the latest MBA - II Sem result notice, enabling postgraduate management students to check their scores in online mode.

CCSU Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - ccsuniversity.ac.in through the result portal result.ccsuniversity.ac.in. Students can open the declared result notice for MBA - II Sem, then proceed to the main result page and log in using their roll number or enrolment number to download the provisional marksheet. After checking subject-wise marks and overall result status, candidates must verify all details carefully and contact the university or their college in case of any discrepancy or query regarding the result.

sections.heading: Chaudhary Charan Singh University Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: CCSU has started publishing second semester results for various UG and PG programmes, and the MBA - II Semester result has now been added to the declared result list for 2026. Through the official CCSU result portal, students can select their course, semester and exam session, and access the digital marksheet that will be treated as provisional until the original marksheet is issued by the university.

sections.heading: Chaudhary Charan Singh University Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: CCSU has listed MBA - II Sem in its declared result notice page and mapped it to the main online result portal, where students can log in to check their marks. Using the direct links below, students can first verify that the MBA 2nd Semester result has been released, and then proceed to the mark entry window to view or download their CCSU MBA result.

links.label: CCSU MBA 2nd Semester Result 2026 - Release Notes (Declared Result Notice)
CCSU MBA 2nd Semester Result 2026 - Main Online Result Portal
CCS University Official Website - Result Section

sections.heading: How to Download CCSU MBA 2nd Semester Result 2026

content.text: Students can use the steps given below to check CCSU MBA II Sem Result 2026 online.

items: Visit the official CCSU result release notes page at https://result.ccsuniversity.ac.in/releasenotes.php to confirm that "MBA - II SEM." result has been declared.
After confirming, open the main result portal in a new tab: https://result.ccsuniversity.ac.in/
On the result page, choose the appropriate result category (All odd/even Semester Traditional/Professional courses Result-2019 onwards) and click on it.
Select your course as "MBA" and semester as "II Sem" (or similar combination) from the dropdown or list options provided on the screen.
Enter your Roll Number or Enrolment Number in the required field correctly.
Click on the "Submit" or "View Result" button to display your CCSU MBA 2nd Semester Result 2026.

Your online marksheet will show your name, roll number, course, semester, subject-wise marks and result status (Pass/Fail/Back etc.). Download or print the marksheet and verify all details carefully; if any discrepancy is found, immediately contact your college examination cell or CCSU.
